evals.prompt: Rank top clinical trial sites for breast cancer in the United States. Search broadly (no location), then filter the ranked list to US sites. Use a collaboration-hub metric.
evals.expected_output: Uses ranking.filters country=United States (post-ranking) and metric degree/pagerank; returns ranking.top_sites list.

evals.prompt: Find the sites with the most trials for Alzheimer's disease and explain why frequency is the right metric.
evals.expected_output: Uses metric=frequency; returns ranking.top_sites ordered by num_trials; brief rationale.

evals.prompt: I need trials in California (not just top sites). Search for trials in California and then rank the sites by frequency.
evals.expected_output: Uses search.location=California (because user asked for trials in a location), then metric=frequency.
